Title: Cotton plant defence against a fungal pathogen is enhanced by expanding BLADE-ON-PETIOLE1 expression beyond lateral-organ boundaries

Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: transcript induced by GhBOP1/GhTGA3 regulatory module; promoter contains TGACG element
Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: decreased in GhBOP1-RNAi plants and increased in GhBOP1-overexpression plants after pathogen inoculation
Common_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Defense marker/output gene activated by GhTGA3 and enhanced by GhBOP1
Common_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. GhPR1 expression is positively correlated with GhBOP1 abundance. 2. GhTGA3 activates the GhPR1 promoter through a TGACG element. 3. GhBOP1 enhances GhTGA3-mediated GhPR1 promoter activation in transient assays.
Common_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: qRT-PCR; promoter-GUS transient assays; EMSA; dual-luciferase; GhTGA3 RNAi cotyledon assays
Common_Genes.Interacting_Proteins: GhTGA3; GhBOP1 regulatory module acts on promoter
Common_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Not a nutrient-metabolism gene itself, but a direct downstream defense target central to the GhBOP1-GhTGA3 module.
Common_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Useful reporter/output marker for screening activation of GhBOP1-GhTGA3 defense pathway
Common_Genes.Applied_Promoters: native GhPR1 promoter used in GUS assays

Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: decreased in GhBOP1-RNAi and increased in GhBOP1-OE after infection
Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: tested in roots after V. dahliae inoculation
Common_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: SA-related defense gene positively associated with GhBOP1 activity
Common_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. GhPR2 transcript levels decreased in GhBOP1-RNAi plants. 2. GhPR2 increased in GhBOP1-overexpression plants. 3. Supports involvement of GhBOP1 in SA-mediated defense pathway.
Common_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: qRT-PCR in transgenic cotton after pathogen inoculation
Common_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Downstream marker, not directly proven as direct target.
Common_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Useful defense readout marker for GhBOP1 pathway activity

Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: decreased in GhBOP1-RNAi and increased in GhBOP1-OE after infection
Common_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: JA-related defense gene positively associated with GhBOP1 activity
Common_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. GhPR3 was reduced in GhBOP1-RNAi plants. 2. GhPR3 was elevated in GhBOP1-overexpression plants. 3. Supports a link between GhBOP1 and JA-related defense signaling.
Common_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: qRT-PCR in transgenic cotton after pathogen inoculation
Common_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Marker gene only; direct regulation not shown.
Common_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Useful defense pathway marker for evaluating engineering outcomes

Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: decreased in GhBOP1-RNAi and increased in GhBOP1-OE after infection
Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: tested in roots after pathogen inoculation
Common_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: JA-related defense output positively associated with GhBOP1 activity
Common_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. GhPDF1.2 was strongly reduced in GhBOP1-RNAi plants. 2. GhPDF1.2 was increased in GhBOP1-overexpression plants. 3. Supports involvement of GhBOP1 in JA-associated defense responses.
Common_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: qRT-PCR in transgenic cotton after pathogen inoculation
Common_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Used as downstream defense marker rather than direct mechanistic target.
Common_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Useful marker of enhanced disease defense output

Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: deaminates L-phenylalanine to trans-cinnamic acid, initiating phenylpropanoid flux toward lignin
Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: cell wall reinforcement and enhanced resistance to Verticillium dahliae
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Expression is positively associated with GhBOP1-mediated lignin accumulation and disease resistance
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. GhPAL1 transcript level was increased in GhBOP1-overexpressing plants. 2. GhPAL1 transcript level was reduced in GhBOP1-RNAi plants. 3. Its expression pattern was used as evidence that GhBOP1 promotes lignin biosynthesis.
Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: qRT-PCR of transgenic lines; lignin staining and lignin quantification as downstream metabolic readouts
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: measured in stems/roots of transgenic cotton; induced in GhBOP1 overexpression and reduced in RNAi lines
Pathway_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Not functionally manipulated directly in this paper; included because it is one of the experimentally assayed lignin biosynthetic genes in Results.
Pathway_Genes.Omics_Data: RNA-seq mentioned for pathogen response, no accession reported
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Marker/readout gene for engineering lignin-associated disease resistance together with upstream regulators such as GhBOP1

Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: hydroxylates trans-cinnamic acid to p-coumaric acid in the early phenylpropanoid pathway
Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: cell wall reinforcement and enhanced resistance to Verticillium dahliae
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Expression is positively associated with GhBOP1-mediated lignin accumulation
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. GhC4H1 was upregulated in GhBOP1-overexpressing plants. 2. GhC4H1 was downregulated in GhBOP1-RNAi plants. 3. Supports activation of lignin biosynthetic pathway by GhBOP1.
Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: qRT-PCR of transgenic lines; lignin staining and chemical quantification
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: higher in GhBOP1-OE and lower in GhBOP1-RNAi
Pathway_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Assayed as downstream lignin-pathway marker rather than directly manipulated.
Pathway_Genes.Omics_Data: RNA-seq mentioned for pathogen response, no accession reported
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Useful lignin-pathway marker for defense-oriented engineering

Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: activates hydroxycinnamate acids to their CoA thioesters for entry into monolignol biosynthesis
Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: cell wall reinforcement and enhanced resistance to Verticillium dahliae
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Expression is positively associated with GhBOP1-mediated lignin accumulation
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. Gh4CL1 transcript abundance increased in GhBOP1 overexpression lines. 2. Gh4CL1 decreased in GhBOP1 RNAi lines. 3. Supports enhanced lignin pathway flux downstream of GhBOP1.
Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: qRT-PCR; lignin profiling by staining and content measurements
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: higher in GhBOP1-OE, lower in GhBOP1-RNAi
Pathway_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Measured as one of the lignin biosynthetic output genes.
Pathway_Genes.Omics_Data: RNA-seq mentioned for pathogen response, no accession reported
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Candidate pathway gene for stacking with regulatory loci to strengthen lignification

Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: 3-hydroxylates p-coumaroyl esters to caffeoyl esters during monolignol precursor formation
Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: cell wall reinforcement and enhanced resistance to Verticillium dahliae
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Expression positively tracks GhBOP1-dependent lignin deposition
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. GhC3H1 was induced in GhBOP1-overexpressing plants. 2. GhC3H1 was repressed in GhBOP1-RNAi plants. 3. Indicates activation of monolignol precursor biosynthesis by GhBOP1.
Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: qRT-PCR; histochemical and biochemical lignin measurements
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: higher in overexpression lines, lower in RNAi lines
Pathway_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Not directly functionally validated beyond expression response.
Pathway_Genes.Omics_Data: RNA-seq mentioned for pathogen response, no accession reported
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Useful supporting enzyme target in lignin-oriented defense engineering

Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: methylates caffeoyl-CoA to feruloyl-CoA in monolignol biosynthesis
Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: cell wall reinforcement and enhanced resistance to Verticillium dahliae
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Expression is elevated by GhBOP1 and associated with increased lignin accumulation
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. GhCCoMT1 expression increased in GhBOP1-overexpressing plants. 2. GhCCoMT1 expression decreased in GhBOP1-RNAi plants. 3. Supports GhBOP1 activation of lignin biosynthetic program.
Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: qRT-PCR; lignin staining and content assays
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: higher in OE and lower in RNAi plants
Pathway_Genes.Omics_Data: RNA-seq mentioned for pathogen response, no accession reported
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential component for boosting lignin-mediated pathogen resistance

Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: reduces cinnamaldehyde derivatives to their corresponding monolignol alcohols for polymerization into lignin
Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: cell wall reinforcement and enhanced resistance to Verticillium dahliae
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Expression is positively linked with GhBOP1-driven lignin accumulation
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. GhCAD5 was upregulated in GhBOP1 overexpression lines. 2. GhCAD5 was downregulated in GhBOP1 RNAi lines. 3. Supports enhanced terminal monolignol formation under GhBOP1 activity.
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: higher in overexpression lines and lower in RNAi lines
Pathway_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Measured as part of lignin biosynthetic response, not directly manipulated.
Pathway_Genes.Omics_Data: RNA-seq mentioned for pathogen response, no accession reported
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Terminal monolignol-step gene that may complement regulatory engineering for stronger vascular lignification

Regulation_Genes.Protein_Family_or_Domain: BTB/POZ domain and ankyrin repeats; NPR1-like BOP family
Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: predominantly expressed in lateral-organ boundaries; induced in roots after Verticillium dahliae inoculation; expands beyond LOBs upon infection
Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: high in lateral-organ boundaries and induced in roots and boundary-adjacent stem tissues after pathogen infection
Regulation_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: reinforces vascular tissues and contributes to fungal disease resistance
Regulation_Genes.Upstream_Signals_or_Inputs: pathogen infection; repression of GhBP1 during infection
Regulation_Genes.Regulation_Mode: positive transcriptional co-regulation/co-activation through interaction with GhTGA3; positive regulation of lignin biosynthetic gene expression
Regulation_Genes.Primary_Regulatory_Targets: GhPR1; GhPR2; GhPR3; GhPDF1.2; GhPAL1; GhC4H1; Gh4CL1; GhC3H1; GhCCoMT1; GhCAD5
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: activates or enhances expression of defense genes and lignin biosynthetic genes; promotes GhTGA3-dependent activation of GhPR1
Regulation_Genes.Protein_Complex_Involvement: forms GhBOP1-GhTGA3 module; possible additional unknown complex for lignin gene regulation proposed
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Positive regulator that enhances cotton resistance to Verticillium dahliae and increases lignin accumulation
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Condition-dependent positive regulator linking pathogen-induced spatial expression to lignin accumulation and defense output
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. GhBOP1 is strongly induced by V. dahliae and its expression expands beyond lateral-organ boundaries. 2. RNAi knockdown increases disease susceptibility, fungal biomass, and vascular browning, whereas overexpression enhances resistance. 3. GhBOP1 interacts with GhTGA3, promotes GhTGA3 binding/activation activity on GhPR1, and positively regulates lignin biosynthetic genes and lignin deposition.
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: RNAi and overexpression in cotton; VIGS; GUS reporter analysis; yeast two-hybrid; luciferase complementation imaging; subcellular localization; immunoblotting of nuclear/cytoplasmic fractions; EMSA; dual-luciferase and transient GUS assays; lignin staining and chemical quantification; pathogen assays
Regulation_Genes.Applied_Promoters: 35S constitutive promoter for overexpression/transient assays; native GhBOP1 promoter for GUS reporter; GhPR1 promoter reporter
Regulation_Genes.Potential_Tradeoffs: overexpression plants showed slightly shorter plant height; RNAi plants were slightly slender
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: GhBOP1, not GhBOP2, showed the major defense role in cotton; nucleus accumulation depends on GhTGA3 presence.
Regulation_Genes.Omics_Data: RNA-seq of cotton response to V. dahliae mentioned, accession NA
Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Promising target to improve Verticillium wilt resistance by expanding/inducing GhBOP1 expression while monitoring architecture penalties and possibly stacking with lignin-pathway or TGA components

Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: function tested in cotton roots/cotyledons and heterologous tobacco/protoplast systems
Regulation_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: supports pathogen resistance through defense gene activation and association with lignin-promoting regulatory network
Regulation_Genes.Regulation_Mode: transcriptional activation; DNA binding to TGACG cis-element; activity enhanced by GhBOP1
Regulation_Genes.Metabolic_Process_Controlled: defense gene expression associated with pathogen response
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: activates GhPR1 promoter; its activation activity is promoted by GhBOP1
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Positive regulator required for resistance to V. dahliae and for full GhBOP1-dependent activation of defense gene expression
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Essential GhBOP1 partner that enables nuclear accumulation/function of GhBOP1 and activates downstream defense transcription
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. GhTGA3 is the strongest GhBOP1 interactor among tested TGAs by Y2H and luciferase complementation. 2. GhTGA3 binds TGACG elements and activates transcription, including the GhPR1 promoter. 3. Silencing GhTGA3 reduces nuclear GhBOP1 accumulation, weakens GhPR1 promoter activation, and increases susceptibility to V. dahliae.
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: yeast two-hybrid; luciferase complementation imaging; GFP localization; immunoblotting of protein fractions; EMSA; dual-luciferase assay; transient GUS assay; VIGS and pathogen assays
Regulation_Genes.Applied_Promoters: 35S constitutive promoter in transient assays; GhPR1 native promoter reporter
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Metabolite connection is indirect, through defense transcription and cooperation with GhBOP1 rather than direct lignin enzyme regulation demonstrated.
Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Useful partner target for stacking with GhBOP1 to maximize disease-resistance transcriptional activation

Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: repressed in roots after Verticillium dahliae inoculation
Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: reduced upon pathogen infection; silencing elevates GhBOP1 expression and expands its expression domain
Regulation_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: supports vascular reinforcement-associated pathogen resistance when derepressed via GhBP1 silencing
Regulation_Genes.Regulation_Mode: transcriptional repression of GhBOP1 spatial expression domain; antagonistic regulation relative to GhBOP1
Regulation_Genes.Metabolic_Process_Controlled: spatial control of lignin-associated defense regulation
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: represses GhBOP1 expression and constrains it to lateral-organ boundaries
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Negative regulator whose repression or silencing expands GhBOP1 expression, increases lignin accumulation, and enhances resistance to V. dahliae
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Upstream spatial repressor controlling whether GhBOP1 can activate lignin-associated defense outside lateral-organ boundaries
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. GhBP1 expression decreases after V. dahliae infection. 2. GhBP1 silencing raises GhBOP1 transcript levels and expands GhBOP1pro:GUS expression beyond LOBs. 3. GhBP1-silenced plants show increased resistance, lower fungal biomass, and lignin phenotypes similar to GhBOP1 overexpression.
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: VIGS; qRT-PCR; GUS reporter analysis; pathogen assays; supplementary lignin content measurements
Regulation_Genes.Applied_Promoters: GhBOP1 native promoter in GUS reporter
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Direct physical interaction with GhBOP1 was not observed; acts antagonistically and likely upstream.
Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Repression/editing of GhBP1 could be used to derepress GhBOP1 spatial expression for Verticillium resistance, with caution about possible developmental effects
